entity.name: Apple
entity.description: Late and idiosyncratic AI entrant via Apple Intelligence and on-device models. Distinctive policy stance is privacy-forward (Private Cloud Compute) and EU-adversarial (DMA gatekeeper designation, AI feature withholding in EU). Important counterweight to cloud-centric AI policy framings.

activity.title: Johny Srouji named Apple's Chief Hardware Officer
activity.raw_text: CUPERTINO, CALIFORNIA Apple today announced that, effective immediately, Apple executive Johny Srouji will become chief hardware officer. Srouji, who most recently served as senior vice president of Hardware Technologies, will assume an expanded role leading Hardware Engineering, which John Ternus most recently oversaw, as well as the hardware technologies organization.

_verify_phrases: Johny Srouji will become chief hardware officer

activity.title: Apple introduces MacBook Pro with all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max
activity.raw_text: CUPERTINO, CALIFORNIA Apple today announced the latest 14- and 16-inch MacBook Pro with the all-new M5 Pro and M5 Max, bringing game-changing performance and AI capabilities to the world's best pro laptop.

_verify_phrases: bringing game-changing performance and AI capabilities

activity.title: Apple introduces the new MacBook Air with M5
activity.raw_text: CUPERTINO, CALIFORNIA Apple today announced the new MacBook Air with M5, bringing exceptional performance and expanded AI capabilities to the world's most popular laptop. M5 features a faster CPU and next-generation GPU with a Neural Accelerator in each core, enabling MacBook Air to power through a variety of workflows, from creative projects to complex AI tasks.

_verify_phrases: Neural Accelerator in each core, enabling MacBook Air

activity.title: Apple accelerates U.S. manufacturing with Mac mini production
activity.raw_text: CUPERTINO, CALIFORNIA Apple today announced a significant expansion of factory operations in Houston, bringing the future production of Mac mini to the U.S. for the first time. The company will also expand advanced AI server manufacturing at the factory and provide hands-on training at its new Advanced Manufacturing Center beginning later this year. Altogether, Apple's Houston operations will create thousands of jobs.

_verify_phrases: expand advanced AI server manufacturing at the factory
